hero.title: Plans & Pricing
hero.description: Choose the plan that matches your workflow.

payg.name: Pay-as-you-go
payg.description: Flexible, commitment-free access to all Pro-level tools. Buy tokens and fix issues instantly — only pay when you need help.
payg.bestFor: Webmasters, DIY site owners, small businesses.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Unlimited AI repairs, builds, and optimization tools for professionals managing one or multiple sites.

agency.name: Agency
agency.description: Unlimited usage for agencies managing multiple client sites. Deliver client-ready reports in seconds and scale your client operations.
agency.bestFor: Agencies, studios, and professionals managing multiple client sites.

tokenPacks.title: Token Packs
tokenPacks.description: Buy tokens on demand and keep AI operations moving with no subscription lock-in.

small.description: 10,000 AI tokens for automated fixes (~25 website operations). One-time purchase — tokens never expire.
small.name: Small

medium.description: 25,000 AI tokens for automated fixes (~50 website operations). Great value — tokens never expire.
medium.name: Medium

large.description: 50,000 AI tokens for automated fixes (~100 website operations). Maximum value — tokens never expire.
large.name: Large

footnotes.fairUse: Unlimited usage is subject to fair-use guidelines.
footnotes.tokenVaries: Token consumption varies by operation complexity.

tokens.question: How do tokens work?
tokens.answer: Tokens are used to pay for AI-powered repairs, builds, and advanced analyses. Each operation consumes a specific number of tokens based on complexity.

switchPlans.question: Can I switch plans later?
switchPlans.answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings.

expire.question: Do my tokens expire?
expire.answer: Tokens do not expire within the current billing year. We’ll notify you well in advance if this changes.

anyPlan.question: Can I use token packs on any plan?
anyPlan.answer: Yes. Token packs work with all plans, including Pay-as-you-go.

tooltips.unlimitedRepairs: Run as many AI repairs as you need without limits.
tooltips.unlimitedBuilds: Generate new components, pages, and code with no usage cap.
tooltips.priorityQueue: Your tasks are processed faster during peak times.
tooltips.whiteLabelReports: Export client-ready reports with your own branding.
tooltips.tokenUsage: Tokens are consumed when running AI operations.
tooltips.tokenPackUsage: Tokens are consumed when running AI repairs, builds, or advanced operations.
